creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 197360
patch

USES=compiler:c++11-lang is required on platforms that still use base GCC.

Also, while here, add USES=gnome, because:
/!\ lasi-1.1.1_5: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

Using USE_GNOME alone is deprecated, please add USES=gnome.
